name: @ai-sdk/baseten
description: The **[Baseten provider](https://ai-sdk.dev/providers/ai-sdk-providers/baseten)** for the [AI SDK](https://ai-sdk.dev/docs) contains language model and embedding model support for the [Baseten](https://baseten.co) platform.
